subtitle: A rule-based reminder engine for Moodle that chases incomplete, inactive and overdue learners automatically, escalates to their managers, and proves it works — all on cron, with audit-ready logs.
shortDescription: Automated, rule-based course-completion and compliance reminders for Moodle, with manager escalation, branded templates, analytics and audit-ready logs.
intro: Modern Course Reminder turns learner follow-up into an automated engine. Instead of teachers chasing learners by hand, rules detect who has not started, not finished, gone inactive or missed a deadline — and send the right reminder on the right channel, on cron.

On that foundation it escalates still-incomplete learners to their line manager, drafts branded templates (optionally with AI), batches manager digests, and reports on what actually moved completion — with filterable, exportable logs and a Report Builder datasource for audit.

guarantee.alt: 30-day money-back guarantee — try it for 30 days; if it doesn't work as described and our support can't resolve it, we'll refund 100%

featuregroups.heading: Rules & triggers
items: Triggers for not-started, course-incomplete, inactivity and deadline approaching/overdue
Scope a rule to a single course, a whole category, a cohort, or site-wide
Target overall course completion or specific completion-tracked activities (multi-select)
Preview the exact learners a rule matches before it sends
Ready-made starter rules: not started, incomplete, inactive, deadline, overdue-with-escalation

featuregroups.heading: Course-level management & guided setup
items: Teachers manage reminder rules from inside their own course
A setup checklist guides completion tracking, criteria and activity completion
Rules that target completion are blocked until the course is correctly configured

featuregroups.heading: Sending & campaigns
items: One-off manual send to a course with audience filters and a recipient preview
Eligible and skipped recipients shown with reasons before anything sends
One-off and recurring scheduled campaigns (daily / weekly / monthly)
Repeat cadence with a maximum-reminders cap
Campaign start/stop dates and a daily send window control exactly when sends go out

featuregroups.heading: Manager escalation
items: Resolve a learner's line manager three ways: Moodle manager role, custom profile field, or a manual mapping table
Bulk-import learner→manager mappings from CSV
Escalate on days overdue, number of reminders received, or a fixed compliance date
Dedicated manager-escalation templates and report

featuregroups.heading: Templates & content
items: Reusable templates for learner, manager and digest audiences
~25 placeholders (name, course, due date, days overdue, manager, dashboard URL and more)
Brand colours and an email-safe logo that resolves to an absolute URL
Sandboxed preview with sample data before anything sends
Optional AI drafting via Moodle's own AI subsystem — no API keys stored in the plugin

featuregroups.heading: Channels & delivery
items: Email and Moodle notification, selectable per rule and gated by site-wide switches
Batched manager/admin digests — daily, weekly or monthly
Per-run throttle, configurable retries and retry delay

featuregroups.heading: Automation & operations
items: Seven scheduled tasks: evaluate → build queue → send → retry → digests → cleanup → refresh
De-duplication so a learner is never spammed
Queue viewer to cancel or requeue individual items

featuregroups.heading: Analytics & reporting
items: Dashboard cards: active rules, sent today/this week, pending queue, failed, overdue learners, escalations
Effectiveness analytics: learners reminded, completed-after-reminder, average days to complete, repeats
Delivery, overdue, inactive, rule-performance and manager-escalation reports
Filterable, exportable audit logs
Report Builder datasource for the reminder delivery log

featuregroups.heading: Safety & trust
items: Learner opt-out and automatic skipping of suspended / no-email / exempt users
Built-in health check for cron, email, queue, tasks, manager mapping, templates and AI
Capability-based access for admins and teachers

featuregroups.heading: Platform & privacy
items: Built on core Moodle APIs (Completion, Enrolment, Messaging) — no external service to host
Full GDPR privacy provider with user export and deletion
Moodle 4.5–5.2, GPLv3
Drop-in successor to local_course_reminder with a CLI data migration

title: Reminders on autopilot
checks: Rules detect not-started, incomplete, inactive and overdue learners
Scope a rule to a course, category, cohort or the whole site
Target course completion or specific completion-tracked activities
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The rule builder form open on a new/edited rule, showing the Trigger and conditions section (Course not completed / Learner inactive / Deadline / Enrolled-but-not-started) and the 'Applies to' scope selector. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/rule_edit.php (#region-main), light UI, 16:9 crop.

title: Guided setup, no broken rules
checks: Teachers manage reminder rules right inside their own course
A setup checklist covers completion tracking, criteria and activities
Rules that target completion are blocked until the course is set up correctly
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The course-level rules page showing the 'How course completion reminders work' checklist and the guardrail notice ('Course completion criteria have not been defined… Set up course completion'). Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/rules.php?courseid=85 (#region-main); if the course is fully set up, capture rule_edit.php?courseid=85 to show the criteria-missing guidance. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Rescue inactive learners
checks: Re-engage learners with no course access or no progress for X days
Repeat every N days with a maximum-reminders cap
Preview the exact learners a rule matches before it sends
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The 'Preview matched learners' screen for an inactivity rule — the list of learners who match right now with their reason (e.g. 'No course access for 14 days'). Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/rule_preview.php (#region-main). Alternatively the inactive-learners report at report_inactive.php. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Escalate to managers
checks: Resolve a line manager by Moodle role, profile field or manual mapping
Bulk-import learner-to-manager mappings from CSV
Escalate on days overdue, reminders received, or a fixed date
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Manager mapping page showing the mappings table (learner → manager, course/org-wide) and the Add mapping / Bulk import actions. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/managermap.php (#region-main). Optionally inset the rule's Escalation section (days overdue / number of reminders / date). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Branded, AI-drafted templates
checks: Reusable learner, manager and digest templates with ~25 placeholders
Brand colours and an email-safe logo, with a sandboxed preview
Draft with Moodle's own AI subsystem — no API keys stored here
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The AI template generator — the 'Describe the email' brief box and a generated draft preview with brand colours. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/template_ai.php (#region-main). Alternatively the template editor with the live brand-coloured preview (template_edit.php / template_preview.php). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Every channel, batched digests
checks: Email and Moodle notification, selectable per rule
Manager and admin digests batched daily, weekly or monthly
Channels gated by site-wide switches for safe rollout
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The plugin Settings page showing the Channels section (Enable email / Enable Moodle notifications / Enable digests / Digest frequency). Capture /admin/settings.php?section=local_moderncoursereminder_settings, the Channels heading region. Or a rendered manager digest email ('the following N team members are overdue'). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Send a reminder now
checks: One-off manual send to a course, with audience filters
Preview eligible and skipped recipients — with reasons — before sending
Email preview, then send now — no rule or schedule required
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Send reminder now page — the course + audience selector (All enrolled / Not completed / Not started), the 'Preview recipients' result showing the Eligible and Skipped lists (with reasons), and the email preview. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/manualsend.php (#region-main). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Scheduling & campaigns
checks: Ready-made starter rules — launch a campaign in a click and adjust
One-off and recurring scheduled campaigns (daily / weekly / monthly)
Daily send windows and start/stop dates control exactly when sends go out
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Scheduled campaigns page — the campaigns list with recurrence (One-off / Daily / Weekly / Monthly) and send time, plus the Add campaign action. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/schedules.php (#region-main). Optionally inset the Rule library starter blueprints at ruletemplates.php. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Runs entirely on cron
checks: Evaluate → queue → send → retry across seven scheduled tasks
De-duplication so a learner is never spammed
Per-run throttle, retry limits and a cancel/requeue queue viewer
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Reminder queue page — the per-recipient queue table with status (Pending / Sent / Failed / Cancelled), attempts, scheduled time, and Cancel/Requeue actions. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/queue.php (#region-main). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Prove it lifts completion
checks: Effectiveness: learners reminded and completed-after-reminder
Average days-to-complete and repeated-reminder counts
Live dashboard of rules, sends, pending, failed, overdue and escalations
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Reminder effectiveness analytics page — cards/charts for learners reminded, completed after reminder, average days to complete, repeated reminders. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/report_analytics.php (#region-main). Alternatively the main dashboard metric cards at index.php. 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Audit-ready by design
checks: Filterable, exportable delivery logs of every reminder sent
Overdue, inactive, rule-performance and escalation reports
Report Builder datasource for the reminder delivery log
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Reminder logs page — the audit log table with filters (course, audience, channel, status, date) and an export control. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/logs.php (#region-main). Optionally inset the Reports index (reports.php). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Safe, respectful sending
checks: Learner opt-out and auto-skip of suspended / no-email / exempt users
De-dup and a daily send window keep volume sane
Built-in health check for cron, email, queue, mapping and templates
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Health check page — the status table (Cron, Email delivery, Send queue, Scheduled tasks, Manager mapping, Message templates, AI) with OK / Warning / Problem badges. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/healthcheck.php (#region-main). 16:9 crop, light UI.

title: Moodle-native, future-proof
checks: Built on core Completion, Enrolment and Messaging APIs — nothing external to host
Full GDPR privacy provider with export and deletion
Moodle 4.5–5.2; one-command switch from the old free reminder plugin
image: IMAGE TO ADD: The Modern Course Reminder dashboard as a confident 'home' shot — the sidebar navigation plus the overview metric cards and recent activity. Capture /local/moderncoursereminder/index.php (#region-main). 16:9 crop, light UI.
